problems_encountered.description: HTTP 403 error when listing project memberships for p-fvayu4. API returned 'Unexpected response status (expected 200, got: 403)'

tool_response_summary: Failed to list project memberships due to 403 permission denied error
execution_notes: Tool executed but returned permission error. This may be due to insufficient access rights on the newly created project, or a limitation in the API access scope.
